title: . Apprentices without compensation. The Secretary of Labor and Employment may authorize the
content:
. Apprentices without compensation. The Secretary of Labor and Employment may authorize the 
hiring of apprentices without compensation whose training on the job is required by the school or training 
program curriculum or as requisite for graduation or board examination. 
13 
Downloaded from the Department of Labor and Employment, Republic of the Philippines - 29 September 2011  
http://www.dole.gov.ph/labor_codes.php?id=34 
 
 
Chapter II 
LEARNERS
